title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at dnata India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at dnata India
jsonLd.description:
We at dnata India are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Surat. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About dnata India:
dnata India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with dnata India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
